title: WII – Scientific Consultant Grade – I – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Scientific Consultant Grade – I. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WII official website.

basic_details.job_title: WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Scientific Consultant Grade – I. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WII official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects from a recognized institute/University or BE/B Tech in equivalent subject with Five – Ten years of experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Wildlife Institute of India Scientific Consultant Grade - I Recruitment 2026
